title: Membrane Fractionation
steps: seed cells for 24:00:00 in a 10 cm dish at a density of 6 x 10 6 cells per plate
wash cells with 1X PBS for 2 times
scrape cells of the dish and harvest in 1 ml pf PBS + PI buffer
resuspend cells in 500 µl PBS + PI buffer
sonicate 2 times at 30Hz for 15 ON-OFF intervals of 10 s each (1 s pulse on/off).
340000 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes collect supernatant as cytosolic fraction
was pellet 3 times with PBS + PI buffer
disolve pellet in 500 µL 1x PBS +PI+ 1% Trtiton
340000 rpm, 4 °C, 15 minutes collect supernatant as membranous fraction
creator: Joris Van Asselberghs
